title: Project Gamma
description:
(i was a kid when i made this. just letting you know) 
Another Alternate Universe....




MODPACK!!!!!!!!!! NANI!!  NO WAY!! THIS IS A MODPACK!! YAY!!
body:
Welcome To Minecraft Gamma.
Another Minecraft Alternate Universe Mod Project.
What If Mojang Left The Beta Phase, But instead Of Release, IT'S A NEW DEVELOPMENT STAGE! It make sense because they made indev and infdev. Anyways Its Another Phase That Isn't Release But Didn't Add hunger But They still made the adventure Update But in this new Phase. The Last Phase before Release is omega. anyways enough yapping. 
TIME TO TELL YOU WHAT IS IN THIS PROJECT!!

-STAMINA. Replaces hunger. 

-New Mobs. Like Glares, Mooblooms, Pigmen and more!

-Nether ovehaul-  EXPLORE THE NETHER

-SKY DIMENSIONS. Explore the aether and its lost additions!

-THE END DIMENSION. they added the end and overhauled it.

-Copper TOOLS. Easy to obtain.

-PLUSHIES. craft your cute plushes.
AND MORE!!
Thanks for reading.
There are more stuff here.
Credits To Everyones Mod and TexturePacks In here.
